response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to agentic workflows at Naver, but lacks demonstrable production-scale multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech environments, has no clear track record leading teams beyond 10 people, and shows no evidence of architecting real-time credit-risk or working-capital systems — critical gaps for this executive role.
strengths: Experienced in agentic workflows and AI infrastructure at Naver
Strong backend and distributed systems background with event-driven systems
Proven ability to build and maintain open-source technical tools and platforms
concerns: No evidence of leading engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people
Lacks documented experience in fintech infrastructure or regulated AI systems
No demonstrated architecture of real-time credit-risk or liquidity optimization systems
